name: Example Org (slug-based handbook format)
description: AI-powered adaptive learning platform for K-12 schools across Southeast Asia with offline sync and Bahasa curriculum support.
innovation_rationale: Shipped adaptive AI tutoring used by 120 schools in Jakarta since 2024.
market_traction_rationale: Reported 40% YoY revenue growth and 50,000 active student users in 2025.
competitiveness_rationale: Only local LMS with Bahasa-first content aligned to national K-12 curriculum.
product_depth_rationale: Offers LMS, parent portal, and offline mobile sync across 3 product tiers.
social_proof_rationale: Winner of EdTech Asia 2025 "Best K-12 Platform" award in Singapore.
